summary: Created a comprehensive 35-component IoT/OT industrial platform architecture JSON matching the ecommerce-aws reference format exactly. File is valid JSON and passes all acceptance criteria: 35 components (30+ required), 46 connections (30+ required), 7 Purdue Model trust boundaries, 6 data flows, all 25 named components present, Purdue Levels 0-5 OT zone tagging, safety_critical flags on SIS/PLC/SCADA components, real industrial protocol versions (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC-UA 1.05, MQTT 5.0, WireGuard ChaCha20-Poly1305), and IEC-62443 / NIST-CSF-2.0 / CIS-Controls-v8 / NERC-CIP compliance mappings.
